title: cardamine hirsuta subsp. multicaulis
intro: Cardamine hirsuta subsp. multicaulis, also known as hairy bittercress, is a perennial herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Hairy bittercress is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions or as a raw ingredient in salads and other culinary dishes.
